description: Creates a review template for the Well-Architected Tool.

TemplateArn.markdownDescription:
The review template ARN.

---

Required: No  
Type: String  
Minimum Length: 50  
Maximum Length: 250  
Pattern: ^arn:aws(-us-gov|-iso(-[a-z])?|-cn)?:wellarchitected:[a-z]{2}(-gov|-iso([a-z])?)?-[a-z]+-\d:\d{12}:(review-template)/[a-f0-9]{32}$  
Update requires: No interruption
Read only property: Yes

TemplateName.description: The name of the review template.
TemplateName.markdownDescription:
The name of the review template.

---

Required: Yes  
Type: String  
Minimum Length: 3  
Maximum Length: 100  
Pattern: ^[A-Za-z0-9-_.,:/()@!&?#+''\s]+$  
Update requires: No interruption

Description.markdownDescription:
The review template description.

---

Required: Yes  
Type: String  
Minimum Length: 3  
Maximum Length: 250  
Pattern: ^[A-Za-z0-9-_.,:/()@!&?#+''\s]+$  
Update requires: No interruption

Lenses.description: The lenses applied to the review template.

items.markdownDescription:
